_meta.geography: Texas (DFW, Houston, Austin, San Antonio + suburban office-park zones)
_meta.target_profile: Independent commercial / HOA / property maintenance landscape contractors, 5-50 crew, family-name shops with commercial-contract heavy mix; ETA / search-fund / independent-sponsor acquisition candidates
exclusions_applied: U.S. Lawns franchise corporate (independent franchisees only)
Ethoscapes / Genesis Park rollup (Westco Grounds was absorbed into this PE platform — excluded)
EarthWorks / Osprey Landscape Group (PE rollup — excluded)
Davey Tree (employee-owned, but ~$2B revenue — too large for SBA-financed micro-acquisition target profile)
Living Earth (Bain Double Impact acquisition — supply, not service)
ABC Home & Commercial (pest-control parent, separate vertical)
spine_sources_used: Google web search variants by metro + 'commercial landscape' + 'family owned' + 'HOA'
TNLA member references (directory page returns AJAX-loaded JS; direct member scraping not feasible without authentication)
Individual company websites (primary verification of founding year, ownership, service mix)
Fort Worth Report '30 years of lawn care' feature
Crunchbase / D&B / BBB profiles for cross-check on ownership
_meta.verification_method: Each candidate's homepage / about page fetched; ownership type, founding year, and platform-affiliation confirmed before inclusion. Companies with unverified ownership left in with flag.
_meta.stop_reason: Budget conservation. 41 high-quality verified candidates across all 4 priority metros, sufficient seed depth for downstream enrichment scoring. Continuing past this point hits diminishing returns on independence-verification at the cost of remaining token budget.

service_mix: commercial / education / churches / athletic fields / residential — commercial-heavy
independence_notes: Locally owned, community-focused messaging. 45 years tenure. Not on any PE-rollup or national-chain list. Strong commercial-heavy mix — education + churches + athletic fields are recurring contract revenue.

service_mix: commercial — HOA / parks / government / education / retail / hospitals (turn-key commercial)
independence_notes: Award-winning. WBE/DBE/HUB certified with State of TX. 37 years tenure, single-owner private. Strong commercial-only mix. Northwest Houston commercial corridor — Cypress, Tomball, Spring, The Woodlands.

service_mix: commercial / landscape construction / multi-location property mgmt / sports turf / residential mix
independence_notes: Founded 1987 by Rogelio Maldonado + 3 sons (Jerry, Oscar, Roy). 'One of Texas's largest privately owned landscaping companies' — 6 locations across 5 cities, 500+ employees. NALP/TCIA/TCEQ certified. POSSIBLY TOO LARGE for SBA micro-acquisition profile — flag for size-based deprioritization downstream, but family-owned and not PE-affiliated.

service_mix: commercial / HOA / residential mix
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated. 33 years tenure. Serves 15+ DFW municipalities. Award-winning. Tarrant County base.

service_mix: commercial — HOA / multi-family / nursing homes / office parks / retail
independence_notes: Independent, woman-owned, family-operated. 28 years tenure. Multi-city operations (Houston HQ, satellites in Dallas, San Antonio, Austin) — single ownership. Strong HOA/multi-family contract base. FEMA-certified disaster restoration adds recurring storm revenue.

service_mix: commercial / HOA / retail / multi-family + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned. 20+ years tenure. Greater Houston coverage including Katy, Sugar Land, Pearland, Pasadena, The Woodlands. Mix-trade (lawn + landscape + fencing + hardscape).

service_mix: commercial / upscale residential — River Oaks, Bellaire, Memorial. Plant health care heavy.
independence_notes: Founded by licensed horticulturist. 38 years tenure. 'Houston's Green Standard' — niche premium positioning.

service_mix: commercial — HOA / office park / retail / multi-family + residential
independence_notes: Family name in legal entity — Castro Family. Austin + Round Rock + Elgin + Manor + Pflugerville. Founding year not on website (flag for enrichment to pull from TX SOS).

service_mix: commercial grounds maintenance / landscape install + residential mix
independence_notes: Veteran-owned (USMC), founded by John Hill 1983. 42 years tenure. TNLA Certified Landscape Professionals on staff. Prime owner-succession candidate given founder age + tenure.

service_mix: commercial — HOA / multi-site portfolio + residential
independence_notes: Owner 'Oscar' referenced in testimonials. HOA-specialist focus. Founded year not on website.

service_mix: commercial — HOA + residential
independence_notes: Founder Tim Massey. Owner-operated. 10+ years. Stone Oak / Hill Country coverage. Younger company — may not yet hit 10-yr-tenure threshold for ETA, but worth scoring.

service_mix: commercial + residential mix
independence_notes: Founded by Javier Ponce. 25 years. Family name — son in business name = generational continuity already, mid-succession candidate.

service_mix: commercial maintenance + residential mix — north DFW suburbs
independence_notes: Locally owned. 31 years. North DFW suburban office-park territory (Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Allen, Prosper) — high-growth commercial corridor.

service_mix: commercial property maintenance + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned. 'More than 100 years of combined experience' (team). Eponymous owner. Service area extends into Oklahoma.

service_mix: commercial property + residential — North TX suburbs
independence_notes: Private. 26 years. 50+ employees, 5000+ clients. Denton County base. Strong recurring-revenue licensing (TCEQ + commercial pesticide).

service_mix: commercial-only — 280 commercial properties under mgmt
independence_notes: Minority/Women-Owned (certified). 40+ years tenure. Pure commercial play — 280 properties. TX-licensed irrigators + pesticide applicators on staff. BOMA / Apt Assn / CAI member. Highly recurring-contract revenue.

service_mix: commercial-only — industrial parks, office, retail, hospitality, corporate campuses, healthcare, HOAs/POAs, education
independence_notes: 26 years. Three TX locations: Dallas, San Antonio, Fort Worth. Pure commercial. Ownership type unverified — flag for confirmation, but no PE-rollup affiliation surfaced in search. Multi-city reach via single ownership is consistent with independent operator.

service_mix: commercial grounds maintenance / construction + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated. 24 years tenure. McKinney base (Collin County) — high-growth north DFW. BBB A+.

service_mix: premium lawn / landscape / irrigation — commercial + residential; no weekly mow service (signals premium positioning)
independence_notes: Locally owned and family operated. Fort Bend County base (Sugar Land) — suburban office park / HOA corridor. Premium positioning ('no weekly mow'). Year founded not on site — flag for enrichment.

service_mix: commercial maintenance / design / install + residential — top-100 nationally ranked
independence_notes: Locally owned and operated by a Dallas family. 30 years tenure. 375+ employees. Top-100 US ranking, 200+ industry awards. Branches in Dallas, Haltom City (Fort Worth), Carrollton. POSSIBLY TOO LARGE for SBA micro-acquisition profile but family-owned and not PE-affiliated.

service_mix: commercial-only — HOA, prof office buildings, retail, healthcare
independence_notes: 42 years tenure. Houston + Dallas presence. NALP+TNLA managers on staff. Ownership type not disclosed on website — independence FLAGGED for verification before active outreach. No PE-rollup affiliation surfaced.

service_mix: commercial maintenance / install + athletic fields + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned, 2nd generation. Founded 1984 by Wayne Winner; now run by son Kevin Winner. 41 years tenure. NALP-certified staff. Strong succession story — already through one generational transition; subsequent transition likely 3-7 years out.

service_mix: commercial-only — 1,100+ commercial accounts greater Houston
independence_notes: Family-owned. 45 years tenure. 1,100+ commercial accounts — recurring contract base is the asset. Has affiliated tree-care arm (Embark Services). Prime owner-succession candidate.

service_mix: commercial maintenance / install / tree / irrigation / drainage
independence_notes: Two-city presence (Dallas + Houston) with full-service commercial focus. Founding year + ownership not disclosed on site — flag for verification. No PE-rollup affiliation surfaced.

service_mix: commercial-heavy — apartments, hospitals, churches, banks, golf, hotels, industrial
independence_notes: 11+ years. Greater Houston (22 communities). Diverse commercial mix — hospitals/golf/hotels are sticky contracts. Private contractor, ownership not disclosed but no chain affiliation.

service_mix: commercial / industrial — full-service
independence_notes: 10+ years. South Tarrant base. Commercial-focused. Ownership not disclosed — flag for verification.

service_mix: commercial + high-end residential — design/install/maintain
independence_notes: 20+ years. 'Official Landscape Co. of the Dallas Cowboys' — premium brand association. Multi-state (TX + NW Arkansas). Ownership not disclosed.

service_mix: commercial-heavy — multi-family, churches, banks, prof offices, commercial centers, municipalities
independence_notes: Founded 1980 by Chris Easterling. 45 years tenure. Multi-market: DFW + Tyler + McKinney + Longview. Prime owner-succession candidate.

service_mix: commercial design/install/sprinkler + residential — NW Houston (Cypress, Katy, Woodlands, Tomball)
independence_notes: Family-owned and operated. 40+ years. NW Houston commercial corridor. Founder eponymous (Theiss family).

service_mix: outdoor living / hardscape-heavy + commercial + residential
independence_notes: 32 years. Cypress base. Founder 'C.W.' referenced. Hardscape-heavy = lower recurring revenue than mow-and-maintain, but installs land high-margin work.

service_mix: commercial maintenance + residential — HOA / office park / retail / multi-family across Austin metro + Highland Lakes
independence_notes: Locally owned. 18 years. 2,000+ properties maintained. TX-licensed irrigator. Wide service area into Highland Lakes resort towns.

service_mix: commercial install/management/tree + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned. Founded 1997 by Miguel + Patricia Carranza; 4 children now run divisions. 28 years tenure. Already executing intra-family generational transition — owner stability + likely longer-horizon exit.

service_mix: landscape / maintenance / hardscape / tree + commercial + residential
independence_notes: Locally owned and family-operated. Owner has 20+ years experience. Fort Worth + Tarrant County.

service_mix: design/install/maintain + outdoor living — residential + commercial
independence_notes: 35+ years experience claimed. DFW Metroplex. Ownership not disclosed on site — flag for verification.

service_mix: commercial-heavy — HOA / office / warehouse / dealership / shopping centers / banks / churches / hospitals / multi-family
independence_notes: Multi-county TX coverage (Tarrant, Denton, Wise, Parker, Johnson, Ellis). Pure HOA / commercial focus — high recurring revenue. Ownership not disclosed.

service_mix: commercial maintenance — HOA / MUD / commercial / tree
independence_notes: Pure HOA / commercial / MUD focus across Greater Austin. Contact email Mike@... — owner-operator signal. In-house crews. Founding year + ownership not disclosed.

service_mix: commercial maintenance / design / construction / irrigation
independence_notes: Family-owned. Founded 2003 by Jay + Yolanda Martin. 22 years tenure. Greater Austin coverage.

service_mix: landscape / maintenance / sprinkler / water features / masonry — commercial + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned. 43 years tenure. Prime owner-succession candidate given founder generation age.

service_mix: commercial / residential — lawn maintenance / design / hardscape / xeriscape
independence_notes: Family- and minority-owned. 10+ years. SA Current top-3 ranking claim.

service_mix: commercial install / tree / grounds maintenance + ranches + select residential
independence_notes: Family-owned, founded by John 'Big John' Leifester. ISA Certified Arborist + TX Certified Landscape Professional. Commercial + ranch — unusual mix worth investigating, founder personal brand = succession candidate.

service_mix: commercial maintenance / install / hardscape / lighting + athletic fields + residential
independence_notes: Family-owned. 45+ years tenure (founded 1980). 200+ team members. 10,000+ projects. Wylie / Collin County base. POSSIBLY TOO LARGE for SBA micro-acquisition but family-owned, not PE.

service_mix: lawn maintenance / property maintenance / landscaping + hardscape — North DFW
independence_notes: Family-owned. Run by Jonathan + Jacob Herrera (CEO + Co-CEO). North DFW suburbs (Frisco, Plano, McKinney, Denton, Prosper).

service_mix: design/install/irrigation + commercial — Austin metro + 9 surrounding counties
independence_notes: Family- and veteran-owned. 21 years tenure. Williamson County base, broad Austin metro reach.

service_mix: commercial maintenance / HOA / grounds mgmt + residential — Central TX broad reach
independence_notes: Family-owned (per prior search confirmation). 25+ years. 200+ active commercial accounts. TNLA Certified, BBB A+. Wide Central TX coverage Waco-to-SA.

service_mix: design / install / hardscape / commercial + HOA + residential — Montgomery County / NW Houston
independence_notes: 15 years. Montgomery County base, serves The Woodlands / Spring / Conroe. Eponymous founder. Strong reviews (5.0 / 156).

service_mix: landscape / tree / hardscape / sprinkler / commercial maintenance + residential
independence_notes: Locally owned (Doug-owner per testimonials). 35 years tenure. Katy / Sugar Land / Cypress / Richmond coverage. NOTE: heavy tree-care exposure may overlap with tree-care vertical — flag for downstream filter.

service_mix: design / outdoor entertainment / lawn / commercial + residential — East Dallas / Rockwall
independence_notes: Owner-operator (Eric DeFeo). 35+ years experience claimed. Family-name shop. East Dallas / Rockwall corridor.
